notes: instructor-baseline: program-provided reference baseline (pass@1=0.7267, 5 trials x 30 tasks).
day1-baseline: our own Act I run (pass@1=0.1333, 1 trial x 30 tasks, llama-3.3-70b). Used as Delta A denominator.
mechanism-eval: Act IV result on sealed held-out slice — to be populated after mechanism run.

entries.name: instructor-baseline
entries.notes: Program-provided reference baseline. Used as Delta C reference.

entries.name: day1-baseline
entries.notes: Our Act I run. Used as Delta A denominator for mechanism evaluation.

entries.name: mechanism-eval
entries.notes: Act IV mechanism eval: gpt-4o-mini with confidence-proportional phrasing gate on held-out retail slice (20 tasks, 1 trial). 9/20 passing. 4 tasks errored (reward=0, 0 messages) counted as failures per tau2 convention. Delta A = +0.3167 vs day1-baseline (+237.6%).
